promotions.title: VIP Black Friday
content:
Tiered Discount & Gift Promotion

• Spend $200 → 25% off

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Excludes: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers. Non-transferable. Not valid on previous purchases.

Gift with Purchase

• Use code VIP2025 for a free gift with orders $300+ (before taxes).

• Valid 11/24/25 – 11/30/25, 11:59 PM EST, or while supplies last.

• Limit one gift per order. Not eligible for return or exchange.

Exclusions & Rules

• Cannot combine with other offers, codes, coupons, or promotions.

promotions.title: Cyber Monday
content:

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Exclusions: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers, codes, coupons, or promotions. Non-transferable and not valid on previous purchases.

• Gift with Purchase: Available on orders $300+ (before taxes). Select at checkout. Limit one gift per order. Valid 12/1/25 or while supplies last. Not eligible for return or exchange.

• Valid: 12/1/25 – 12/3/25.

conversation.message_text: Be Amazing: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Be Amazing.
Be Amazing: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Be Amazing: 

Text back if you have any questions!

I wanted purchase the brown sugar oatmeal protein powder using the subscription service on TikTok specifically because there is a 15% discount AND free shipping. When I add it to my cart though, it is still charging me for shipping?!? It says free shipping so why is it charging me???
* to

Be Amazing: Thanks for reaching out and I'm sorry to hear that. I don't have any info on that code but there could be some requirements included with it. Interested to know where you got it? Think you can send me a screenshot? I'll be more than happy to help out! Also, we offer free shipping on domestic orders over $100.

This is straight from your shop on TikTok. Another issue I have is that if I order one, the price is $28.89, but if I want to get 2 of them the individual price goes up to $33.99. Will send these screenshots as well.
Be Amazing: I'm so sorry for the inconvenience. Unfortunately, the image that you sent didn't go through here in my end. Would you mind sending it again, please?
This is what the price goes up to if I order 3 as a one time order. The price is even higher plus I am still being charged for shipping!?!
Here's the first one I sent. Please let me know if you get it.

Be Amazing: I understand your frustration, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this has caused. I'm afraid the screenshot you sent appears to be a broken file on my end. Would you mind sending it again?
How else can I send it to you? I have an iPhone. I'll try to see if I can save it as a PDF.
Be Amazing: I'm really sorry for the trouble! The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hi@youcanbeam.com. Our team is happy to help!
Will I get an answer quickly??

Be Amazing: Our team is doing everything to respond to each inquiry in a timely manner. They should follow up with you in no time! Please check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there.
I just sent an email, yet again summarizing the situation. I think this is the 4th time I've done this.
I tried sending the PDF version here, but it failed to send. Hopefully I'll get an answer pretty quickly from my email.
Still haven't gotten a response from my email

Be Amazing: I totally understand the frustration with this! Our team handles emails in the order they come in and sending additional ones will further delay the team's response. Rest assured that one of my colleagues will follow up with you in no time!

If you go to your storefront in TikTok and try to order the brown sugar protein powder using the subscription service. You can expand the subscription box and you'll see the free shipping right there.
Be Amazing: Thanks for letting me know! Since you have contacted the team they should get back in touch regarding the concerns you raised. Remeber to check your spam and promo folders too.
I will, but I do have them saved as a contact.
I do not want to run out of it which is why I really wanted to place the order today.
Template used: "How soon will I get a response from customer support - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 17:43:03.641
Be Amazing: I understand. Our team is doing everything to respond to each inquiry in a timely manner. They should follow up with you in no time!

content: • 50-90% Off Sitewide - No offer code needed

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

conversation.message_text: Fashion Nova: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Fashion Nova.
Fashion Nova: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Terms: http://sms.fashionnova.com/cl/Vbi Privacy: http://sms.fashionnova.com/cl/EzD
Fashion Nova: You made the FN list! Now, tap the link to get 30% OFF the ENTIRE site with code FN105-rcbhb5! -> http://sms.fashionnova.com/a1kcO1ZpYaNn .

Hi Fashion Nova Team,

I’m reaching out regarding my order placed on October 12th, which was expected to arrive by October 22nd. As of October 30th, I still haven’t received my package. According to the UPS tracking information, the order has been sitting at a facility for over 7 days with no further movement.
This delay has become a serious inconvenience, as I have an upcoming event that depends on the items I ordered. I’m requesting a clear explanation for the delay and reassurance that my package will be delivered within 5 days.

In addition, I would like to initiate a UPS claim regarding this shipment. UPS informed me that since Fashion Nova is the shipper, the claim must be filed through your team.

Here are my order details for your reference:

Order Number: 168604037

Tracking 
Number: 1ze3500b0379159882

Order Date: October 12th

Expected Delivery: October 22nd

Please confirm that a claim has been filed with UPS and provide an update on when I can expect my package to arrive. I’d greatly appreciate your help in resolving this matter promptly, as I need the items this week.

Thank you for your time and attention.

Best regards, Colleen Francis  colleenbarry75@gmail.com (347) 814 - 3252

Fashion Nova: I'm really sorry for the trouble! This is definitely not the experience we want you to have. This will be best handled by visiting http://sms.fashionnova.com/avikv12koFdl and beginning an inquiry with our team!
How do I go about beginning an inquiry
Fashion Nova: You can use the link I sent earlier then select and follow the prompts related to your inquiry! If you need any help or have questions, just let me know.
I've completed this process twice already and received an email on both occasions saying that a human agent will contact me and that never happened.
I would just like to receive my package as it's very important for an upcoming event on the 8th Nov.

Fashion Nova: Thank you for sharing this with me. I'm sorry to hear that and for the inconvenience. Have you tried checking your spam and promo folders as well? Sometimes our emails end up there. Let me know how that goes. I'll be here.
I can assure you I've checked and no one has reached out to me

Fashion Nova: Thank you for letting me know, and I'm really sorry for the inconvenience this may have caused. I'm afraid I can't help with this directly, as my system isn't set up for this type of issue. I recommend following up to our customer support team, as they're best equipped to help and will take great care of you. We truly appreciate your patience and understanding during this time.
I'd like to have a refund

Fashion Nova: Thank you for following up, and I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. Just to confirm, have you already followed up with our team regarding this? If so, have you already checked your spam and promo folders to see if our response is there? Sometimes, our email ends up there. Please let me know how that goes, I'm here to assist you.

escalate: Before you ESC use ESC template
When ESC a discount or promo code issues, include the discount code in the notes
templates: For order related updates/status, use UPD shortcut
